---
layout: single
sidebar:
  nav: excel_sidebar
title: 'Excel'
toc: true
toc_sticky: true
---

## What is Excel? 

Excel is an online spreadsheet service provided through office 365. It is an 
effective software for working with large scale datasets through its many functions
which can automate what would otherwise be tedious work. It's ability to perform
complex calculations offers another benefit to using the software for all fields

## Why learn Excel? 

Excel is used in just about every disciplinary ranging from business through
the environmental world. It's connections through office 365 make it effective
to use in whole organizations as well as its collaborative use with other softwares
and coding languages to work on projects. Excel also offers script offers an 
opportunity to learn basic data management, data types, SQL logic, introductory 
script writing, and introductory coding.

## Resources
